title: madhuca ochracea
intro: Madhuca ochracea, also known as Yellow Butter Tree, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. The medicinal properties of Madhuca ochracea include its bark, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this tree include its potential to treat fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Madhuca ochracea is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
